scripts.build: vp run build:wasm && vp run build:lib && vp run build:examples && vp run build:apps
scripts.build:wasm: cd crates/astro-analyzer && vp exec wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir ../../packages/astro-analyzer-wasm/dist --out-name index
scripts.build:wasm-dev: cd crates/astro-analyzer && vp exec wasm-pack build --target web --dev --no-opt --out-dir ../../packages/astro-analyzer-wasm/dist --out-name index
scripts.build:lib: vp run --filter lingui-for-svelte... --filter lingui-for-astro... --filter unplugin-lingui-macro... build
scripts.check: vp run check:ts && vp run check:markup
scripts.release: vp run build && vp pm publish -r --access public --provenance
